extended_help:
Cooldown 30 seconds • cost 10 stamina.

**Fish uses:**
1. **Sell** — use /sell for instant coins
2. **Cook** — use /cook to make Fish Soup (+40 HP) or other recipes

**Drop:** 13 fish types from Common to Legendary
**Rarity:** ⚪ Common 50% • 🟢 Uncommon 28% • 🔵 Rare 14% • 🟣 Epic 6% • 🟡 Legendary 2%

Tip: Don't sell Rare+ immediately, save for cooking before /hunt. Average sell ~35💰.
See table: /droprate type:fish
author: {{username}} is fishing
cook_value: Can be used for Fish Soup
